title: Addiction Counseling and Rehabilitation Master's Program Application and Fees
content:
Addiction Counseling and Rehabilitation Master's Program Application and Fees

2025-2026 Spring

Semester online application deadline: December 15, 2025

Application Deadline: Sunday, January 25, 2026

Results Announcement Date: Wednesday, January 28, 2026

Main List Registration Deadlines: January 28 - February 4, 2026

Reserve List Registration Deadlines: February 5 - 13, 2026

Click here

for Online Pre-Registration Link.

ALES Score Type:

EQUAL WEIGHT (EA)

Dear candidate students;

There will be no science exam in our Thesis/Non-Thesis Master's Programs;

1) In our thesis programs, 65% of the ALES in the numerical score type, 35% of the undergraduate graduation grade point average,

2) In non-thesis programs, 50% of the undergraduate graduation grade, 50% of the science exam will be evaluated.

Applications of candidates who do not apply online, who are not graduates at the time of application, and who do not upload their ALES document and identity information to the application system during application will be considered invalid.

- Original or certified copy of the undergraduate diploma

-Original or certified copy of the undergraduate transcript (transcript)

-ALES exam result document (for Thesis Program)

-Copy of identity card

-Photo (2 Pieces)

SPECIAL CONDITIONS FOR CANDIDATES

Who Can Participate in the Program?

Only graduates of the Faculty of Medicine, Psychology, Guidance and Psychological Counseling can apply to the program.

- ALES result document (at least 55 points from Equal Weight point type) for applications to programs with thesis

-Applicants will be selected in order of success.

ATTENTION TO THE STUDENTS OF THE GRADUATE SCHOOL OF SOCIAL SCIENCES CLINICAL PSYCHOLOGY/APPLICED PSYCHOLOGY MASTER PROGRAM:

Students who have passed at least 3rd semester in the Clinical Psychology/Applied Psychology Master's Program will be able to apply to the Addiction Counseling and Rehabilitation Non-Thesis Master's Program in the 2022-2023 Spring semester.

Students will first apply online from our website,

Will take any of the science exams mentioned below,

After the exam, they will be able to register within the quota according to their success order.

Students who are eligible to register must complete their 1-week internship at the NPAMATEM Clinic and submit their graduation project after successfully giving the difference courses as a result of the transcript review.

Students who fulfill the program requirements (10 courses, 90 ECTS, internship, project) will be entitled to receive the Addiction Counseling and Rehabilitation Non-Thesis Master's Program diploma.

TUITION FEES:
